adam_job.text: Adam works as a software engineer at a small fintech startup.

adam_fav_color.text: Adam's favorite color is dark green.

adam_instrument.text: Adam plays bass guitar in a local cover band on weekends.

adam_pet.text: Adam has a tortoiseshell cat named Mira.

adam_dislikes_cilantro.text: Adam strongly dislikes cilantro and avoids it in food.
